1.name: Another's Burden
1.description: Take on the wound penalties of another.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

2.name: Obsidian Shattered
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

3.name: Burden Another
3.description: Force your wound penalties upon another target.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

4.name: Obsidian's Edge
4.description: Cause damage to another within eyesight.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

5.name: Flay
5.description: As Obsidian's Edge, but against multiple targets.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 88-89

rituals.name: Mirror of the Gods
rituals.description: Enchant a mirror so that it reveals the use of blood sorcery.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

rituals.name: Shroud of Day
rituals.description: Enchant a stake so that it puts a vampire into supernatural sleep as well as torpor.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

rituals.name: Brother's Eyes
rituals.description: See and hear through another individual.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

rituals.name: Strength of the Vanquished
rituals.description: Symbolically devour the organs of an opponent to gain their strength temporarily.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 89

rituals.name: Severance
rituals.description: Remove the heart or another body part of an individual while keeping them alive.
references: Blood Sacrifice: The Thaumaturgy Companion Pg. 90
